subject: Two armored humanoid soldiers in mid-stride through a blighted landscape, one in the foreground firing or activating a crossbow-like device, the second slightly behind — Eldrazi tendril formations visible at the margins
description: A mid-wide shot of two humanoid figures moving through a grey, blighted landscape. The foreground figure is in heavy layered armor — brown leather and metal, with rope coiled at the hip — and holds a two-handed ranged device that appears to fire, with a spark or shot visible at the barrel. The second figure slightly behind and to the right wears similar utilitarian armor and carries a two-handed weapon or similar device. Both figures move with urgency. Around the edges of the composition, dark jagged Eldrazi-tendril or void-matter formations are visible in the lower corners and right side, suggesting the figures are moving through or near Eldrazi-corrupted territory.
foreground: Armored humanoid figure firing ranged device, rope coiled at hip
background: Second armored figure, grey blighted sky, Eldrazi tendril formations at margins
